content.text:
[cron:b2041412-e817-4b28-8f3c-d13655a8487e light-scan] You are TRADER running LIGHT SCAN.
Workspace: agents/trader/ (relative to workspace root)
Read ONLY config/SCAN_CONFIG.md. Do not read any other file.

STEP A — Validate config:
- If last_updated = INIT or age >60min → CONFIG_VALID: false
- Skip S/R and funding checks if CONFIG_VALID: false, log: CONFIG_STALE

STEP B — Fetch live data via Aster DEX API (https://fapi.asterdex.com):
- Current price: BTC/USDT, ETH/USDT, XRP/USDT, XAG/USDT
- 3-minute price change % for each pair
- Current volume vs 30d average % for each pair
- Current funding rate for each pair

STEP C — Trigger Detection (check all applicable):
1. PRICE: any pair moved >0.6% in last 3min → TRIGGER
2. VOLUME: any pair volume >175% of 30d average → TRIGGER
3. S/R ZONE: any pair price inside support_zone or resistance_zone → TRIGGER
   (only if CONFIG_VALID, skip if CONFIG_STALE)
4. FUNDING DELTA: |current_funding - [pair]_funding_last| >0.18% on any pair → TRIGGER
   (only if CONFIG_VALID, skip if CONFIG_STALE)

STEP D — Increment LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT by 1 in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
(Write ONLY: LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT, and TRIGGER_PENDING/TRIGGER_PAIR/TRIGGER_REASON if triggered)

STEP E — If NO trigger:
→ Append to logs/SCAN_LOG.md:
[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8] LIGHT BTC:[price] ETH:[price] XRP:[price] XAG:[price] VOL:[%] NO_TRIGGER
→ If LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT >= 20 AND SILENT_MODE: ON:
  → Reset LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT: 0
  → Send Telegram to chatId 2060972655:
  [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8] | Silent Mode Active
  BTC:[price] ETH:[price] XRP:[price] XAG:[price]
  Next deep scan: [time+30min]
→ Stop.

STEP F — If trigger detected:
→ Set TRIGGER_PENDING: ON in config/SCAN_CONFIG.md
→ Set TRIGGER_PAIR: [pair], TRIGGER_REASON: [reason]
→ Reset LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT: 0
→ Append to logs/SCAN_LOG.md:
[YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8] LIGHT TRIGGER:[pair] REASON:[reason] PRICE:[price]
→ Stop. Do not send Telegram.
Current time: Monday, March 2nd, 2026 — 7:01 AM (Asia/Hong_Kong)

# SCAN_CONFIG.md
# 版本: 2026-03-02（修正版）
# Source of truth for light-scan. Updated by trader-cycle every 30min.
# Light-scan reads ONLY this file.
#
# WRITE PERMISSIONS:
# light-scan  → ONLY: TRIGGER_PENDING, TRIGGER_PAIR, TRIGGER_REASON, LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT
# trader-cycle → ALL other fields

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [META]
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
config_version: 1.0
update_count: 0
last_updated: INIT
created: 2026-02-28 UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [PRICES] — Snapshot from last deep cycle
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_price: 0
BTC_price_ts: INIT
ETH_price: 0
ETH_price_ts: INIT
XRP_price: 0
XRP_price_ts: INIT
XAG_price: 0
XAG_price_ts: INIT

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [ATR] — ATR(14) on 4H
# 0 = INIT state: skip S/R calculation entirely
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_ATR: 0
ETH_ATR: 0
XRP_ATR: 0
XAG_ATR: 0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_LEVELS] — Active Support/Resistance
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support: 0
BTC_resistance: 0
ETH_support: 0
ETH_resistance: 0
XRP_support: 0
XRP_resistance: 0
XAG_support: 0
XAG_resistance: 0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [SR_ZONES] — Pre-calculated ±0.3×ATR ranges
# Format: lower-upper
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_support_zone: 0-0
BTC_resistance_zone: 0-0
ETH_support_zone: 0-0
ETH_resistance_zone: 0-0
XRP_support_zone: 0-0
XRP_resistance_zone: 0-0
XAG_support_zone: 0-0
XAG_resistance_zone: 0-0

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [FUNDING] — Last recorded funding rates
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
BTC_funding_last: 0
ETH_funding_last: 0
XRP_funding_last: 0
XAG_funding_last: 0
funding_ts: INIT

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# [STATE_FLAGS] — System state
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
CONFIG_VALID: false
SILENT_MODE: OFF
SILENT_MODE_CYCLES: 0
TRIGGER_PENDING: ON
TRIGGER_PAIR: BTCUSDT
TRIGGER_REASON: PRICE_3MIN_-0.876pct
LIGHT_SCAN_COUNT: 10

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# PROTECTION RULES (for agents reading this file)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# If last_updated = INIT → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If age >60min → CONFIG_VALID: false
# If CONFIG_VALID: false → skip S/R zone check, skip funding delta check
# If ATR = 0 → skip ALL S/R calculations
# Timestamp format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC+8

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ADAPTIVE SAMPLING MODES
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# ACTIVE: default — full cycle reports
# SILENT: SILENT_MODE_CYCLES >= 2 — no routine Telegram
# FAST:   TRIGGER_PENDING=ON + age <25min — skip SOUL/STRATEGY read

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# LIGHT-SCAN TRIGGER CONDITIONS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Price >0.6% in 3min                     → TRIGGER
# Volume >175% 30d avg                    → TRIGGER
# S/R zone entry (CONFIG_VALID only)      → TRIGGER
# Funding delta >0.18% (CONFIG_VALID only) → TRIGGER

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# SILENT MODE EXIT (any one)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Volume >175% | Price >0.45% | S/R zone | Funding >0.18%
# TRIGGER_PENDING: ON | User: "exit silent mode"
# Silent report: every 20 light-scans (~60min)
STEP A: `last_updated: INIT` → CONFIG_VALID: false → S/R and funding checks skipped (CONFIG_STALE)

arguments.command:
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr?symbol=BTCUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'BTC lastPrice={d[\"lastPrice\"]} priceChange%={d[\"priceChangePercent\"]} volume={d[\"volume\"]} quoteVolume={d[\"quoteVolume\"]}')" &
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr?symbol=ETHUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'ETH lastPrice={d[\"lastPrice\"]} priceChange%={d[\"priceChangePercent\"]} volume={d[\"volume\"]} quoteVolume={d[\"quoteVolume\"]}')" &
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr?symbol=XRPUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'XRP lastPrice={d[\"lastPrice\"]} priceChange%={d[\"priceChangePercent\"]} volume={d[\"volume\"]} quoteVolume={d[\"quoteVolume\"]}')" &
curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr?symbol=XAGUSDT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'XAG lastPrice={d[\"lastPrice\"]} priceChange%={d[\"priceChangePercent\"]} volume={d[\"volume\"]} quoteVolume={d[\"quoteVolume\"]}')" &
wait

arguments.command:
# Get 3-min klines for price change
for sym in BTCUSDT ETHUSDT XRPUSDT XAGUSDT; do
  data=$(curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/klines?symbol=${sym}&interval=1m&limit=4")
  python3 -c "
import json
d = json.loads('$data' if '$data' != '' else '[]')
if not d or len(d)<2:
    print('${sym}: NO DATA')
else:
    # open of 3 min ago vs current close
    open3 = float(d[-4][1]) if len(d)>=4 else float(d[0][1])
    close = float(d[-1][4])
    chg = (close - open3)/open3*100
    print(f'${sym}: open3min={open3} close={close} 3min_chg={chg:.4f}%')
" 2>/dev/null || echo "${sym}: parse error"
done

arguments.command:
# Get funding rates
for sym in BTCUSDT ETHUSDT XRPUSDT XAGUSDT; do
  curl -s "https://fapi.asterdex.com/fapi/v1/premiumIndex?symbol=${sym}" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
fr = float(d.get('lastFundingRate','0'))*100
print(f'${sym}: funding={fr:.6f}%')
" 2>/dev/null
done
